faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Howard Beach?
faqs.answer: Howard Beach's proximity to Jamaica Bay and mature landscaping provides ideal habitat for stink bugs. These pests are attracted to the neighborhood's well-maintained homes and seek entry through small cracks in fall and winter to overwinter indoors, making professional exclusion and treatment essential.
